sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62111" key="laxaneu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰχᾰν-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n62111.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λαχανοπώλης</ref></xr>, Id.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Proll.ad Hes.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:p.5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.5</biblScope> </bibl> G.</sense> </entryFree>
